rows.description: 平台代登记商家信息，商家待认领。Public directories list IMPORTACION ASIA QIU S.L. in Poligono Industrial La Cova, Manises, as bazar/services wholesale activity. Chinese surname Qiu appears in the company name and public record clues. Sources: donde-estamos.es and qdq.com public business pages.
